notes: v0.16.16 — BASTION shield = Space + ready indicator. BASTION's Space key now actively deploys the shield burst — 1 second of full invulnerability + chunky bubble aura with rotating energy strobes. A pulsing outer ring + [SPACE] prompt sit above the ship whenever a shield charge is available so you always know when the shield is armed. Each press consumes 1 charge from the existing pool (cap 3, recharges every 8s). 0.45s press-debounce so a held Space doesn't drain every charge in one frame. Windows only.
